daily.text: Ship 3 substantive replies (copy → open post → paste)
Answer people who replied to you
Tell Claude shipped so scorecard updates

weekly.text: 15 substantive replies (stretch 25 only if quality holds)
Reply to engagers while conversation is live
20-min review: rooms, best reply, profile visits, follows

profile.text: Bio states wedge in one line
Pinned post is mission or best artifact

hooks.name: Plain deflation
hooks.structure: what they called X is just [flat translation].

note: Hooks are STRUCTURE only. Rewrite in voice.md. Never paste AI-tell templates as-is.
